TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Afa Anoa'i(ryax 21 tay byacing na 11 squ kawas na 1942 - squ ) , squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Afa Anoa'i htgan na ryax maki Western Samoa, trang hbkuw cinngasal myan ga masu maki beh San Francisco, California qasa. Anoa'i sakang' United States Naval Sea Cadet Corps. qnxan nya Afa Anoa'i maki tay kawas 1960 msqun ki Lynn Anoa'i, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Afa Anoa'i hiya ga m'pqnahan . t'aring sa kawas 1971, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na pqnahan. maki sa kawas 1994 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: a*a anoaʔi(rjax ** taj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na ** s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu ) , s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral a*a anoaʔi ħtɣan na rjax maki wes~ɕtern s~ɕamoa, traŋ ħβkuw ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal mjan ɣa mas~ɕu maki βeħ s~ɕan *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo, ʦ~ʨali*ornia qas~ɕa. anoaʔi s~ɕakaŋʔ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ na*al s~ɕea ʦ~ʨa*et ʦ~ʨorps~ɕ. qnxan nja a*a anoaʔi maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ljnn anoaʔi, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja a*a anoaʔi ħija ɣa mʔpqnaħan . tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na pqnaħan. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa mħŋaw ini ptzjuwaw la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Afa Anoa'i(ryax 21 tay byacing na 11 squ kawas na 1942 - squ ) , squliq na Bunge'. qyanux na sraral Afa Anoa'i htgan na ryax maki Western Samoa, trang hbkuw cinngasal myan ga masu maki beh San Francisco, California qasa. Anoa'i sakang' United States Naval Sea Cadet Corps. qnxan nya Afa Anoa'i maki tay kawas 1960 msqun ki Lynn Anoa'i, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Afa Anoa'i hiya ga m'pqnahan . t'aring sa kawas 1971, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na pqnahan. maki sa kawas 1994 lga mhngaw ini ptzyuwaw la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: a*a anoaʔi(rjax ** taj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na ** s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - s~ɕqu ) , s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral a*a anoaʔi ħtɣan na rjax maki wes~ɕtern s~ɕamoa, traŋ ħβkuw ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal mjan ɣa mas~ɕu maki βeħ s~ɕan *ranʦ~ʨis~ɕʦ~ʨo, ʦ~ʨali*ornia qas~ɕa. anoaʔi s~ɕakaŋʔ unite* s~ɕtates~ɕ na*al s~ɕea ʦ~ʨa*et ʦ~ʨorps~ɕ. qnxan nja a*a anoaʔi maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki ljnn anoaʔi, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja a*a anoaʔi ħija ɣa mʔpqnaħan . tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na pqnaħan. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa mħŋaw ini ptzjuwaw la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
